prerequisites: A Mux account with access to the Mux Dashboard.

A Mux Access Token created under Settings > Access Tokens, which provides a Token ID and a Secret Key. Mux only stores a hash of the secret, so save the Secret Key when it is shown; it cannot be recovered later.
A start date (start_date) defining the point in time from which to begin syncing data.

authMethods.name: HTTP Basic authentication (Mux Access Token)
authMethods.summary: The Mux API authenticates requests using HTTP Basic Auth. The connector's username field is the Access Token ID and the password field (secret) is the Token Secret Key.

setupSteps.title: Create a Mux Access Token
setupSteps.body: In the Mux Dashboard, go to Settings > Access Tokens and create a new access token. Mux generates a Token ID and a Token Secret Key. Copy the Secret Key immediately, because Mux stores only a hash of it and cannot recover it later.

setupSteps.title: Provide credentials to the connector
setupSteps.body: Set the username field to your Mux Access Token ID and the password field to your Token Secret Key. These are used for HTTP Basic authentication against the Mux API.

setupSteps.title: Set the start date
setupSteps.body: Set the required start_date field to the date from which the connector should begin syncing data from Mux.

setupSteps.title: Optionally set a playback ID
setupSteps.body: If needed, set the optional playback_id field to the playback ID of a Mux video asset to scope or identify the data being retrieved.

sources.title: Mux: Make API requests (HTTP Basic Auth and Access Tokens)
